title: wedelia pauciflora
intro: Wedelia pauciflora, also known as the creeping wedelia or wedelia, is a tropical perennial plant native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of wedelia pauciflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, flu, and respiratory issues.
